title: King and Pawn Opposition
description: Use direct opposition to move your king in front of the pawn and escort it to promotion.

variants.label: Central pawn
variants.detail: White to move: win with king and pawn

solution.explanation: White steps diagonally to keep opposition, gets the king in front of the pawn, then advances only when the king can support promotion. After 3.e7, White uses Kd7 to protect the promotion square, and e8=Q finishes the win.
